notifications.achievementCompleted: You earned a reward! Tap to claim your coins.
notifications.connectionRequestReceived: You have a new connection request from {firstName} {lastName}
notifications.newDmReceived: New message from {userName} while you were away
notifications.newAreasActivated: You just unlocked {totalAreasActivated} new area(s) — explore what's nearby!
notifications.discoveredUniqueMoment: You found something special! Open the map to check it out.
notifications.discoveredUniqueSpace: Hidden gem alert — you're near a unique space!

invites.phone: {name} invited you to Therr — the local community and rewards app. Sign up here to connect: https://therr.com

thoughtReactions.thoughtNotActivated: This user is not permitted to access content without first activating the thought

validation: The required parameters were not provided.

verification.subject: Verify Your {brandShortName} Account
verification.body1: Your account is ready to go! Just click the link below to verify your email and start exploring your local community.
verification.postBody1: If the button doesn't work, copy and paste this link into your browser: {linkUrl}

oneTimePassword.subject: Your {brandShortName} Password Reset
oneTimePassword.body1: No worries — it happens to the best of us! Use the temporary password below to log back in, then head to settings to create a new one.

passwordChange.subject: Your {brandShortName} Password Was Updated
passwordChange.body1: Your password was just changed. If this was you, you're all set — no action needed.
passwordChange.body2: Didn't make this change? Contact us right away so we can secure your account.

ssoNewUser.subject: Welcome to {brandShortName} — Your Account Is Ready
ssoNewUser.body1: Your account has been created! Click below to log in, pick a username, and set your password. You can also continue signing in with SSO.
ssoNewUser.postBody1: If the button doesn't work, copy and paste this link into your browser: {linkUrl}

subscriberVerification.body1: You're now subscribed to updates from {brandName}. We'll only reach out for the big stuff — new features, community highlights, and can't-miss events. If you don't have the app yet, grab it on Google Play or the Apple App Store.

pendingInvite.header: You Have a New Friend Request
pendingInvite.body1: {fromName} wants to connect with you on {brandName}. Tap below to respond!

newGroupInvite.body1: {fromUserName} invited you to join the group {groupName}.
newGroupInvite.body2: Join to unlock group chat and stay in the loop on upcoming events. Log in to check your invite.
newGroupInvite.postBody1: If the button doesn't work, copy and paste this link into your browser: {linkUrl}

newGroupMembers.header: New Members Just Joined Your Group!
newGroupMembers.body2WithMembers: {membersList} recently joined your group {groupName}. Log in to review their requests if your group requires approval.
newGroupMembers.body2WithoutMembers: New members recently joined your group {groupName}. Log in to review their requests if your group requires approval.
newGroupMembers.postBody1: If the button doesn't work, copy and paste this link into your browser: {linkUrl}

contactInvite.body1: {fromName} wants you on {brandName}! You can also reach them directly at {fromEmail}.
contactInvite.body2: Click below to sign up and start exploring your local community.
contactInvite.postBody1: If the button doesn't work, copy and paste this link into your browser: {linkUrl}

newUserInvite.body1: {fromName} invited you to connect on {brandName}. You can reach them directly at {fromEmail}.
newUserInvite.body2: Click below to finish setting up your profile. Use this one-time password to get started:
newUserInvite.postBody1: If the button doesn't work, copy and paste this link into your browser: {linkUrl}

coinsReceived.body1: You just claimed {coinTotal} TherrCoin(s) for supporting local businesses. Thanks for being an awesome part of the community!

claimApproved.body1: Great news — your business location ('{spaceName}') has been approved and is now visible to nearby users on {brandName}.
claimApproved.body2: Questions? Reach out to us anytime at info@therr.com.
claimApproved.postBody1: Thank you for being part of the {brandName} community. Local businesses like yours make it all possible!

claimPendingReview.header: Your Business Space Is Under Review
claimPendingReview.body1: We've received your request for '{spaceName}' and it's currently being reviewed. You should hear back within 24–72 hours.
claimPendingReview.body2: Keep an eye on your inbox for a confirmation email. Questions? Contact us at info@therr.com.
claimPendingReview.bodyBold: You can edit your listing anytime while it's in review.
claimPendingReview.postBody1: Thank you for being part of the {brandName} community. Local businesses like yours make it all possible!

campaignApproved.header: Your Campaign Is Approved and Ready to Go!
campaignApproved.body1: Your campaign '{campaignName}' has been approved and will begin running on {integrationTargets} at your scheduled time.
campaignApproved.body2: Head to your dashboard for real-time performance insights.
campaignApproved.body3: Questions? Reach out to us anytime at info@therr.com.

campaignPendingReview.body1: We've received your campaign '{campaignName}' and it's being reviewed. Ads will go live on target platforms once approved.
campaignPendingReview.body2: Check your inbox for a confirmation email or visit the dashboard for updates. Questions? Contact us at info@therr.com.
campaignPendingReview.bodyWarning: Heads up: This campaign is past its scheduled end date. Update your schedule to keep your ads running.
campaignPendingReview.bodyBold: You can edit your campaign anytime while it's in review.
campaignPendingReview.postBody1: Thanks for choosing Therr for Business! We're constantly improving our tools to help you reach more local customers. Your feedback is always welcome.

unclaimedSpace.subject: People are searching for {spaceName}
unclaimedSpace.preheaderText: Customers are discovering and talking about your business. Claim your free listing today.
unclaimedSpace.body1: People in your area are discovering {spaceName} on Therr — and they're sharing what's happening at your business in real time. Customers are posting about their experiences, flagging deals, and letting others know when things are busy or when the vibe is great. Your business already has a listing. The question is: who's controlling the story?
unclaimedSpace.body2: When you claim your page, you unlock tools Google can't offer: see real-time customer reports about your business, get paired with complementary local spots that send you foot traffic, and reward customers who spread the word. This isn't just a listing — it's a living, community-powered presence.
unclaimedSpace.bodyBold: It only takes 60 seconds to get started.
unclaimedSpace.postBody1: Already have an account? Simply log in and claim your space from the business page.
unclaimedSpace.missingFieldsIntro: Your listing is still missing some key details:

dashboardSubscriberIntro.body1: Your business is now set up on the "{productPlanName}" plan, and your subscription will auto-renew after the free trial. If you already have a dashboard account, log in to manage your listing.
dashboardSubscriberIntro.body2: New here? Click below to register and get started. Complete your business profile for the best results — our AI-powered campaigns are designed to drive local customers to your door.
dashboardSubscriberIntro.body3: Have questions or want to change your plan? Reach out anytime: {feedbackEmail}
dashboardSubscriberIntro.bodyBold: You may need to log out and back in to see your updated account access.
dashboardSubscriberIntro.postBody1: If the button doesn't work, copy and paste this link into your browser: {linkUrl}

dashboardSubscriberUserNotFound.body1: The email you used to subscribe to Therr for Business doesn't match any account in our system.
dashboardSubscriberUserNotFound.body2: If you haven't created a dashboard account yet, please do so now — or let us know the email you signed up with.
dashboardSubscriberUserNotFound.body3: Once we link your subscription, we'll notify you so you can access all the features right away.
dashboardSubscriberUserNotFound.postBody1: If the button doesn't work, copy and paste this link into your browser: {linkUrl}

sendEmailAndOrPush.newGroupMembersSubject: New members just joined your group!
